untranslatable_reason: The Stomach Pattern requires visual/structural pattern recognition (identification of valleys touching a horizontal line exactly 3 times, prior uptrend confirmation, and specific candle formation characteristics) that cannot be precisely expressed using only the allowed price-action and technical indicators. The signal also lacks author-specified stop loss and profit target levels. Pivot levels (s1) are used as a proxy for support zone C, but the 3-touch support zone validation and stomach candle structure detection require pattern-matching logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using s1 (first support pivot) as a proxy for support zone C. Entry requires: recent uptrend (close > prev_close over multiple bars) AND price touching support (low <= s1). Exit uses reversal below support. However, true pattern validation requires counting support zone touches and identifying stomach candle morphology, which exceeds the capabilities of available indicators.
